overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a young girl character exploring a richly decorated Victorian-style house interior at night. The character walks from a ground floor room past an NPC woman, ascends a short wooden staircase, and enters an upper sitting room with ornate carpets and antique furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor bedroom with dresser and hanging garments

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ground floor room toward the wooden staircase

notable_agents.action: woman standing by the wooden dresser, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: antique brass oil lamp with glass reservoir sitting on wooden table
tall wooden dresser with mirror and drawers against the back wall
clothing items hanging from ropes or racks in the background
framed artwork depicting a harp or string instrument on the left wall
cello or bass instrument leaning against the left wall near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a warmly lit ground floor room with wooden plank flooring. An NPC woman stands by a wooden dresser in the background. The camera passes a brass oil lamp on a table and approaches a staircase, passing a cello and framed artwork on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase leading to upper floor

events.description: character leaves ground floor room and begins ascending wooden staircase
character reaches top of stairs and enters upper room through red curtained doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden staircase toward the upper floor, passing through red velvet curtains

entered.detail: short wooden staircase with steps leading up to the next floor
heavy red velvet curtains framing the doorway at the top of the stairs
large ornate patterned rug covering the floor of the upper room
upholstered green Victorian-style sofa with wooden frame against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden staircase, leaving the ground floor behind. Red velvet drapes frame the doorway at the top of the stairs. Upon reaching the upper level, the character steps onto an ornate Persian carpet and enters a sitting room with a green Victorian sofa visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor sitting room with Victorian furniture

events.description: fully enters the upper sitting room with ornate carpet and antique furnishings

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper sitting room past the green sofa toward the wooden wardrobe

entered.detail: red curtains framing the windows behind the green sofa
framed portrait painting hanging on the right wall
large wooden wardrobe with paneled doors against the left wall
small wooden side table with items on it near the sofa

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper sitting room, walking across the ornate Persian carpet. The green Victorian sofa sits against the far wall with red window drapes behind it. The camera moves past a framed portrait on the right wall and approaches a large wooden wardrobe on the left side of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a warmly lit ground floor room up into an ornate Victorian sitting room. It begins by following the character across wooden plank flooring, passing a brass oil lamp and a cello as an NPC woman stands by a dresser in the background. As the character reaches the stairs, the camera ascends the wooden steps and passes through red velvet drapes to enter the upper level. The scene then shifts from the bare wood of the staircase to the rich textures of an ornate Persian carpet, moving deeper into the sitting room toward a green Victorian sofa. Finally, the camera glides past a framed portrait on the right wall before turning toward a large wooden wardrobe on the left.
